center.name: 帕拉瓜纳半岛
center.summary: 帕拉瓜纳半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-crowned woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: paraguanae, the Paraguaná Peninsula of northwestern Venezuela The red-crowned woodpecker inhabits a wide variety of landscapes, both wet and dry

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: paraguanae, the Paraguaná Peninsula of northwestern Venezuela The red-crowned woodpecker inhabits a wide variety of landscapes, both wet and dry
